LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BERNADETTE SMITH MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING RELIEF FROM DEFAULT CONTINUED FROM DEC-29-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-02-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT FILE HAS A SUPPORTING DECLARATION AND PROPOSED ANSWER. MOTION CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 2, 2010. MOVING PARTY TO SERVE OR RE-SERVE SUPPORTING DECLARATION ON PLAINTIFF BY JANUARY 4, 2010. PLAINTIFF TO FILE NEW OPPOSITION BY JANUARY 21, 2010. DEFENDANT'S REPLY DUE BY JANUARY 27, 2010. ALL PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES WITH DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BERNADETTE SMITH'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING RELIEF FROM DEFAULT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEFAULT OF DEFENDANT BERNADETTE D. SMITH ENTERED ON NOV-10-2009 IS VACATED AND SET ASIDE AND SAID DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE FIVE DAYS FROM ENTRY OF THIS ORDER TO FILE HER ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION SUPPORTS RELIEF UNDER CCP SECTION 473 AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR # 5797

Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BERNADETTE SMITH Motion for Order Granting Relief from Default. Appearances: Bernadette Smith, Defendant in Pro Per appearing and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The default of Defendant Bernadette D. Smith entered on November 10, 2009 is vacated and set aside and said defendant shall have five days from entry of this order to file her answer to the complaint. Defendant's declaration supports relief under CCP section 473 and Plaintiff failed to file supplemental opposition. Order signed in open Court. (302/AJR)Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797

Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Relief From Default
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Continued To Feb-02-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BERNADETTE SMITH Motion for Order Granting Relief from Default. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The Court file has a supporting declaration and proposed answer. Motion continued to February 2, 2010. Moving party to serve or re-serve supporting declaration on Plaintiff by January 4, 2010. Plaintiff to file new opposition by January 21, 2010. Defendant's reply due by January 27, 2010. All parties to provide courtesy copies with Department 302. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
